fields.name: creator
fields.description: Creator user ID (defaults to authenticated user on creation)

fields.name: creationdate
fields.description: Creation date and time as a [Unix timestamp](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Unix_time) (defaults to current date and time on creation)

fields.name: lastmodified
fields.description: Last modification date and time as a [Unix timestamp](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Unix_time) (auto-reset on modification)

fields.name: lastname
fields.description: Last name (surname or company name); is required if `firstname` is empty

fields.name: firstname
fields.description: First name (given name); is required if `lastname` is empty

fields.name: customernum
fields.description: Customer number; only for PROSPECT, CUSTOMERANDSUPPLIER, CUSTOMER or EMPLOYEE

fields.name: suppliernum
fields.description: Supplier number; only for SUPPLIER or CUSTOMERANDSUPPLIER

fields.name: locked
fields.description: Deny booking of billing or procurement transactions

indexes.name: fk_accounts_assigneduser
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX fk_accounts_assigneduser ON accounts USING gin (assigneduser) WHERE assigneduser IS NOT NULL

indexes.name: fk_accounts_contact
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX fk_accounts_contact ON accounts USING btree (contact) WHERE contact IS NOT NULL

indexes.name: fk_accounts_fork
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX fk_accounts_fork ON accounts USING gin (fork) WHERE fork IS NOT NULL

indexes.name: fk_accounts_ownergroup
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX fk_accounts_ownergroup ON accounts USING gin (ownergroup)

indexes.name: i_accounts_lastname_firstname
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX i_accounts_lastname_firstname ON accounts USING btree (lastname, firstname)

indexes.name: i_accounts_nofork
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX i_accounts_nofork ON accounts USING gin (fork) WHERE fork IS NULL

indexes.name: i_accounts_noowner
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX i_accounts_noowner ON accounts USING gin (ownergroup) WHERE ownergroup IS NULL

indexes.name: pk_accounts
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX pk_accounts ON accounts USING btree ("ID")

indexes.name: s_accounts_customernum
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX s_accounts_customernum ON accounts USING gin (customernum gin_trgm_ops) WHERE customernum::text <> ''::text

indexes.name: s_accounts_firstname
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX s_accounts_firstname ON accounts USING gin (firstname gin_trgm_ops) WHERE firstname::text <> ''::text

indexes.name: s_accounts_lastname
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX s_accounts_lastname ON accounts USING gin (lastname gin_trgm_ops) WHERE lastname::text <> ''::text

indexes.name: s_accounts_suppliernum
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX s_accounts_suppliernum ON accounts USING gin (suppliernum gin_trgm_ops) WHERE suppliernum::text <> ''::text

constraints.name: c_accounts_type
constraints.def: CHECK ((customernum::text = ''::text OR (type::smallint = ANY (ARRAY[0, 1, 3, 5]))) AND (suppliernum::text = ''::text OR (type::smallint = ANY (ARRAY[2, 3, 5]))))

constraints.name: fk_accounts_assigneduser
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (assigneduser) REFERENCES users("ID") ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE

constraints.name: fk_accounts_contact
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (contact) REFERENCES contacts("ID") ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE

constraints.name: fk_accounts_fork
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (fork) REFERENCES forks("ID") ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE

constraints.name: fk_accounts_ownergroup
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (ownergroup) REFERENCES groups("ID") ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE

constraints.name: c_customfields_entity
constraints.def:
CHECK (
CASE type
    WHEN 'entity'::text THEN entity IS NOT NULL AND (entity <> ALL (ARRAY['couponcodes'::t_entity, 'participants'::t_entity, 'records'::t_entity, 'stocktransactions'::t_entity]))
    ELSE entity IS NULL
END)

constraints.name: c_customfields_type
constraints.def:
CHECK (type::text = ''::text OR
CASE source
    WHEN 1 THEN type::text = ANY (ARRAY['checked'::text, 'count'::text, 'isset'::text, 'text'::text])
    ELSE type::text = ANY (ARRAY['checked'::text, 'count'::text, 'country'::text, 'currency'::text, 'date'::text, 'datepretty'::text, 'datetime'::text, 'datetimepretty'::text, 'duration'::text, 'email'::text, 'entity'::text, 'filetype'::text, 'isset'::text, 'list'::text, 'money'::text, 'num'::text, 'password'::text, 'percent'::text, 'price'::text, 'pricebilling'::text, 'priceprocurement'::text, 'priceproduction'::text, 'priority'::text, 'progress'::text, 'rate'::text, 'size'::text, 'tel'::text, 'text'::text, 'timing'::text, 'unit'::text, 'url'::text, 'weight'::text])
END)

name: extdata

rules.name: _RETURN
rules.def:
CREATE RULE "_RETURN" AS
    ON SELECT TO extdata DO INSTEAD  SELECT extdatavalues.entity,
    extdatafields.name,
    extdatavalues.index,
    extdatavalues.value,
    extdatavalues.number
   FROM extdatavalues
     JOIN extdatafields ON extdatafields."ID" = extdatavalues.field AND extdatafields.entity = extdatavalues.entity;

rules.name: rd_extdata
rules.def:
CREATE RULE rd_extdata AS
    ON DELETE TO extdata DO INSTEAD  DELETE FROM extdatavalues
  WHERE extdatavalues.entity = old.entity AND (extdatavalues.field IN ( SELECT extdatafields."ID"
           FROM extdatafields
          WHERE extdatafields.entity = old.entity AND extdatafields.name::text = old.name::text)) AND extdatavalues.index = old.index;

rules.name: ri_extdata
ru_extdata
rules.def:
CREATE RULE ru_extdata AS
    ON UPDATE TO extdata DO INSTEAD  UPDATE extdatavalues SET field =
        CASE
            WHEN old.entity = new.entity AND old.name::text = new.name::text THEN extdatavalues.field
            ELSE f_extdatafields_upsert(new.entity, new.name::text)
        END, index = new.index, value = new.value
  WHERE extdatavalues.entity = old.entity AND (extdatavalues.field IN ( SELECT extdatafields."ID"
           FROM extdatafields
          WHERE extdatafields.entity = old.entity AND extdatafields.name::text = old.name::text)) AND extdatavalues.index = old.index;

def:
SELECT extdatavalues.entity,
    extdatafields.name,
    extdatavalues.index,
    extdatavalues.value,
    extdatavalues.number
   FROM extdatavalues
     JOIN extdatafields ON extdatafields."ID" = extdatavalues.field AND extdatafields.entity = extdatavalues.entity;

name: extdatavalues_accounts

rules.name: _RETURN
rules.def:
CREATE RULE "_RETURN" AS
    ON SELECT TO extdatavalues_accounts DO INSTEAD  SELECT extdataregular_accounts.field,
    extdataregular_accounts.index,
    extdataregular_accounts.value,
    NULL::numeric AS number
   FROM extdataregular_accounts
UNION ALL
 SELECT extdatanumeric_accounts.field,

    extdatanumeric_accounts.number

UNION ALL
 SELECT extdataempty_accounts.field,
    extdataempty_accounts.index,
    ''::text AS value,
    NULL::numeric AS number

UNION ALL
 SELECT extdatazero_accounts.field,
    extdatazero_accounts.index,

    0::numeric AS number
   FROM extdatazero_accounts;

def:

triggers.name: ti_items_model
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER ti_items_model BEFORE INSERT ON items FOR EACH ROW WHEN (new.model IS NOT NULL) EXECUTE FUNCTION ftiu_items_model()

triggers.name: tu_items_model
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER tu_items_model BEFORE UPDATE OF model ON items FOR EACH ROW WHEN (new.model IS NOT NULL AND old.model IS DISTINCT FROM new.model) EXECUTE FUNCTION ftiu_items_model()

triggers.name: tu_items_type
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER tu_items_type BEFORE UPDATE OF type ON items FOR EACH ROW WHEN (old.type::smallint <> new.type::smallint) EXECUTE FUNCTION ft_integrity()

name: meta_timezones_offsets

rules.name: _RETURN
rules.def:
CREATE RULE "_RETURN" AS
    ON SELECT TO meta_timezones_offsets DO INSTEAD  SELECT m."ID",
    m.country,
    m.name,
    m.latitude,
    m.longitude,
    m.comments,
    m.abbreviations,
    p.utc_offset AS "offset",
    p.is_dst AS dst
   FROM meta_timezones m
     JOIN pg_timezone_names p ON p.name = m.name;

def:
SELECT m."ID",
    m.country,
    m.name,
    m.latitude,
    m.longitude,
    m.comments,
    m.abbreviations,
    p.utc_offset AS "offset",
    p.is_dst AS dst
   FROM meta_timezones m
     JOIN pg_timezone_names p ON p.name = m.name;

triggers.name: td_payments_transaction
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER td_payments_transaction AFTER DELETE ON payments FOR EACH ROW WHEN (old.transaction IS NOT NULL AND (old.status::smallint = ANY (ARRAY[1, 3]))) EXECUTE FUNCTION ftd_payments_transaction()

triggers.name: ti_payments_transaction
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER ti_payments_transaction AFTER INSERT ON payments FOR EACH ROW WHEN (new.transaction IS NOT NULL AND (new.status::smallint = ANY (ARRAY[1, 3]))) EXECUTE FUNCTION fti_payments_transaction()

triggers.name: tu_payments_transaction
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER tu_payments_transaction AFTER UPDATE OF transaction, status, amount ON payments FOR EACH ROW WHEN ((old.transaction IS NOT NULL OR new.transaction IS NOT NULL) AND (old.transaction IS DISTINCT FROM new.transaction OR old.status::smallint <> new.status::smallint OR old.amount <> new.amount)) EXECUTE FUNCTION ftu_payments_transaction()

constraints.name: c_records_association
constraints.def:
CHECK (
CASE
    WHEN entity IS NULL THEN index IS NULL AND (flag::smallint = ANY (ARRAY[0, 4]))
    ELSE (entity <> ALL (ARRAY['couponcodes'::t_entity, 'participants'::t_entity, 'records'::t_entity, 'stocktransactions'::t_entity])) AND index IS NOT NULL
END)

triggers.name: td_stocktransactions_serials
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER td_stocktransactions_serials BEFORE DELETE ON stocktransactions FOR EACH ROW WHEN (pg_trigger_depth() = 0 AND old.flag::smallint = 0 AND (old.chargenum::text <> ''::text AND old.amount::double precision > 0::double precision OR old.serials IS NOT NULL)) EXECUTE FUNCTION ftd_stocktransactions_serials()

triggers.name: ti_stocktransactions_item
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER ti_stocktransactions_item BEFORE INSERT ON stocktransactions FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION ftiu_stocktransactions_item()

triggers.name: ti_stocktransactions_serials
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER ti_stocktransactions_serials BEFORE INSERT ON stocktransactions FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION fti_stocktransactions_serials()

triggers.name: ti_stocktransactions_subtransactions
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER ti_stocktransactions_subtransactions BEFORE INSERT ON stocktransactions FOR EACH ROW WHEN (new.subtransactions IS NOT NULL) EXECUTE FUNCTION ftiu_stocktransactions_subtransactions()

triggers.name: ti_stocktransactions_transfer
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER ti_stocktransactions_transfer BEFORE INSERT ON stocktransactions FOR EACH ROW WHEN (new.transfer IS NOT NULL) EXECUTE FUNCTION fti_stocktransactions_transfer()

triggers.name: tu_stocktransactions_item
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER tu_stocktransactions_item BEFORE UPDATE OF item ON stocktransactions FOR EACH ROW WHEN (old.item IS DISTINCT FROM new.item) EXECUTE FUNCTION ftiu_stocktransactions_item()

triggers.name: tu_stocktransactions_serials
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER tu_stocktransactions_serials BEFORE UPDATE OF item, storage, transfer, flag, date, chargenum, amount, serials ON stocktransactions FOR EACH ROW WHEN (pg_trigger_depth() = 0 AND (old.item IS DISTINCT FROM new.item OR old.storage IS DISTINCT FROM new.storage OR old.transfer IS DISTINCT FROM new.transfer OR old.flag::smallint <> new.flag::smallint OR old.date::bigint <> new.date::bigint OR old.chargenum::text <> new.chargenum::text OR old.amount::double precision <> new.amount::double precision OR old.serials IS DISTINCT FROM new.serials)) EXECUTE FUNCTION ftu_stocktransactions_serials()

triggers.name: tu_stocktransactions_subtransactions
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER tu_stocktransactions_subtransactions BEFORE UPDATE OF subtransactions ON stocktransactions FOR EACH ROW WHEN (new.subtransactions IS NOT NULL AND old.subtransactions IS DISTINCT FROM new.subtransactions) EXECUTE FUNCTION ftiu_stocktransactions_subtransactions()

triggers.name: tu_stocktransactions_transfer
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER tu_stocktransactions_transfer BEFORE UPDATE OF item, transfer, chargenum, amount, serials ON stocktransactions FOR EACH ROW WHEN (old.item IS DISTINCT FROM new.item OR old.transfer IS DISTINCT FROM new.transfer OR old.chargenum::text <> new.chargenum::text OR old.amount::double precision <> new.amount::double precision OR old.serials IS DISTINCT FROM new.serials) EXECUTE FUNCTION ftu_stocktransactions_transfer()

fields.name: creator

fields.name: creationdate

indexes.def: CREATE INDEX fk_storages_ownergroup ON storages USING gin (ownergroup)

indexes.name: i_storages_noowner
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX i_storages_noowner ON storages USING gin (ownergroup) WHERE ownergroup IS NULL

indexes.name: pk_storages
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX pk_storages ON storages USING btree ("ID")

indexes.name: s_storages_name
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX s_storages_name ON storages USING gin (name gin_trgm_ops)

constraints.name: fk_storages_fork

constraints.name: fk_storages_ownergroup

name: tags

rules.name: _RETURN
rules.def:
CREATE RULE "_RETURN" AS
    ON SELECT TO tags DO INSTEAD  SELECT tagrels.entity,
    tagnames.name,
    tagrels.index
   FROM tagrels
     JOIN tagnames ON tagnames."ID" = tagrels.name AND tagnames.entity = tagrels.entity;

rules.name: rd_tags
rules.def:
CREATE RULE rd_tags AS
    ON DELETE TO tags DO INSTEAD  DELETE FROM tagrels
  WHERE tagrels.entity = old.entity AND (tagrels.name IN ( SELECT tagnames."ID"
           FROM tagnames
          WHERE tagnames.entity = old.entity AND tagnames.name::text = old.name::text)) AND tagrels.index = old.index;

rules.name: ri_tags
ru_tags
rules.def:
CREATE RULE ru_tags AS
    ON UPDATE TO tags DO INSTEAD  UPDATE tagrels SET entity = new.entity, name =
        CASE
            WHEN old.entity = new.entity AND old.name::text = new.name::text THEN tagrels.name
            ELSE f_tagnames_upsert(new.entity, new.name::text)
        END, index = new.index
  WHERE tagrels.entity = old.entity AND (tagrels.name IN ( SELECT tagnames."ID"
           FROM tagnames
          WHERE tagnames.entity = old.entity AND tagnames.name::text = old.name::text)) AND tagrels.index = old.index;

def:
SELECT tagrels.entity,
    tagnames.name,
    tagrels.index
   FROM tagrels
     JOIN tagnames ON tagnames."ID" = tagrels.name AND tagnames.entity = tagrels.entity;

constraints.name: c_transactions_type
constraints.def:
CHECK (
CASE
    WHEN type::smallint >= 10 THEN account IS NULL AND (item IS NOT NULL OR status::smallint = 0) AND (status::smallint >= 0 AND status::smallint <= 4 OR (status::smallint = ANY (ARRAY[22, 23]))) AND productionfactor > 0 AND taxid::text = ''::text AND shippingrecipient::text = ''::text AND shippingpostalcode::text = ''::text AND shippingpostalcode::text = ''::text AND shippingcity::text = ''::text AND shippingregion::text = ''::text AND shippingcountry::text = ''::text AND billingrecipient::text = ''::text AND billingpostalcode::text = ''::text AND billingpostalcode::text = ''::text AND billingcity::text = ''::text AND billingregion::text = ''::text AND billingcountry::text = ''::text AND sellertaxid::text = ''::text AND sellername::text = ''::text AND sellerpostalcode::text = ''::text AND sellerpostalcode::text = ''::text AND sellercity::text = ''::text AND sellerregion::text = ''::text AND sellercountry::text = ''::text
    ELSE item IS NULL AND productionfactor IS NULL AND (status::smallint >= 0 AND status::smallint <= 4 OR
    CASE
        WHEN type::smallint = ANY (ARRAY[0, 5]) THEN status::smallint >= 5 AND status::smallint <= 8
        WHEN type::smallint = ANY (ARRAY[1, 6]) THEN status::smallint >= 9 AND status::smallint <= 16
        WHEN type::smallint = ANY (ARRAY[2, 7]) THEN status::smallint >= 13 AND status::smallint <= 16
        ELSE status::smallint >= 17 AND status::smallint <= 21
    END)
END)

triggers.name: td_transactions_dunning
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER td_transactions_dunning AFTER DELETE ON transactions FOR EACH ROW WHEN ((old.type::smallint = ANY (ARRAY[3, 4, 8, 9])) AND old.status::smallint <> 0) EXECUTE FUNCTION ftud_transactions_dunning()

triggers.name: ti_transactions_item
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER ti_transactions_item BEFORE INSERT ON transactions FOR EACH ROW WHEN (new.item IS NOT NULL) EXECUTE FUNCTION ftiu_transactions_item()

triggers.name: ti_transactions_status
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER ti_transactions_status BEFORE INSERT ON transactions FOR EACH ROW WHEN ((new.type::smallint = ANY (ARRAY[3, 4, 8, 9])) AND new.status::smallint > 4) EXECUTE FUNCTION ftiu_transactions_status()

triggers.name: tu_transactions_dunning
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER tu_transactions_dunning AFTER UPDATE ON transactions FOR EACH ROW WHEN ((new.type::smallint = ANY (ARRAY[3, 4, 8, 9])) AND old.status::smallint <> new.status::smallint) EXECUTE FUNCTION ftud_transactions_dunning()

triggers.name: tu_transactions_item
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER tu_transactions_item BEFORE UPDATE OF item ON transactions FOR EACH ROW WHEN (new.item IS NOT NULL AND old.item IS DISTINCT FROM new.item) EXECUTE FUNCTION ftiu_transactions_item()

triggers.name: tu_transactions_status
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER tu_transactions_status BEFORE UPDATE OF status, netamount, tax ON transactions FOR EACH ROW WHEN ((new.type::smallint = ANY (ARRAY[3, 4, 8, 9])) AND new.status::smallint <> 0 AND (old.status::smallint <> new.status::smallint OR old.netamount::double precision <> new.netamount::double precision OR old.tax::double precision <> new.tax::double precision)) EXECUTE FUNCTION ftiu_transactions_status()

triggers.name: tu_transactions_type
triggers.def: CREATE TRIGGER tu_transactions_type BEFORE UPDATE OF type ON transactions FOR EACH ROW WHEN (old.type::smallint <> new.type::smallint) EXECUTE FUNCTION ft_integrity()
